sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113049" key="xalkeo/gomfos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκεό-γομφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113049.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">brass-riveted,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δῶμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:37:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
